title: lavatera maroccana
intro: Lavatera maroccana, also known as the Tree Mallow or Moroccan Tree Mallow, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Lavatera maroccana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, salves, and creams, can be used to treat skin conditions like eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
